name: weather-check
description: Marine weather forecast retrieval and safety advisor for Alaska coastal waters. Provides current conditions, marine forecasts, wind and wave predictions, and go/no-go safety recommendations based on vessel capability and target area.
author: Cocapn

commands.name: weather:now
commands.description: Show current marine weather conditions for a specified area

commands.name: weather:forecast
commands.description: Show the marine forecast for the next few days

commands.name: weather:safe
commands.description: Assess whether conditions are safe for your vessel and planned trip

commands.name: weather:wind
commands.description: Detailed wind forecast with direction, speed, and gusts

commands.name: weather:alert
commands.description: Check for active marine weather warnings, advisories, and small craft advisories

smallCraftAdvisory.action: Do not depart. Stay in protected waters.

caution.action: Experienced operators only. Protected waters recommended.

marginal.action: Fish protected areas. Monitor conditions. Have an exit plan.

good.action: Good conditions for all areas. Standard safety precautions.

excellent.action: Excellent conditions. Optimal for long runs to distant grounds.
